## oak install root

Install the Oakestra root orchestrator

### Synopsis

Install the Oakestra root orchestrator on this machine.

Requires Docker with Compose support.
Optionally specify a version tag (e.g. v0.4.400).

```
oak install root [version] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for root
  -y, --yes    Skip confirmation prompt
```

```
      --root   Run install scripts with sudo
```
